description: OpenHands skill-creator workflow.research step 0 app prompt JSON output.

assert.value: (() => { const trimmed = output.trim(); if (!trimmed.startsWith('{') || !trimmed.endsWith('}')) return false; const data = JSON.parse(trimmed); const forbidden = new Set(['dimensions_selected', 'research_plan', 'research_lens', 'dimension_scores', 'selected_dimensions', 'topic_relevance', 'dimensions_evaluated', 'options', 'label', 'required', 'kind']); const walk = (value) => { if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.every(walk); if (value && typeof value === 'object') return Object.entries(value).every(([key, child]) => !forbidden.has(key) && walk(child)); return true; }; const sections = data.research_output && Array.isArray(data.research_output.sections) ? data.research_output.sections : []; const questions = sections.flatMap((s) => Array.isArray(s.questions) ? s.questions : []); const allSectionsCanonical = sections.every((s) => Number.isInteger(s.id) && typeof s.title === 'string' && Array.isArray(s.questions) && s.questions.every((q) => q && typeof q === 'object' && !Array.isArray(q))); const allRefinementsEmpty = questions.every((q) => Array.isArray(q.refinements) && q.refinements.length === 0); const text = JSON.stringify(data).toLowerCase(); const noMultiSelectLanguage = !text.includes('select all') && !text.includes('choose all') && !text.includes('all that apply') && !text.includes('multiple answers'); const choicesAreSingleSelectShape = questions.every((q) => typeof q.id === 'string' && typeof q.title === 'string' && typeof q.text === 'string' && typeof q.must_answer === 'boolean' && Array.isArray(q.choices) && q.choices.length >= 3 && q.choices.length <= 5 && q.choices.filter((c) => c && typeof c.id === 'string' && typeof c.text === 'string' && c.is_other === true).length === 1); const notes = Array.isArray(data.research_output?.notes) ? data.research_output.notes : []; const evaluatorNotes = Array.isArray(data.research_output?.answer_evaluator_notes) ? data.research_output.answer_evaluator_notes : []; const noteShape = [...notes, ...evaluatorNotes].every((n) => n && typeof n.type === 'string' && typeof n.title === 'string' && typeof n.body === 'string'); return data.status === 'research_complete' && !('dimensions_selected' in data) && Number.isInteger(data.question_count) && data.research_output && !('questions' in data.research_output) && data.research_output.version === '1' && data.research_output.metadata && data.question_count === questions.length && data.research_output.metadata.question_count === questions.length && questions.length > 0 && sections.length > 0 && allSectionsCanonical && data.research_output.metadata.refinement_count === 0 && Array.isArray(data.research_output.metadata.priority_questions) && !('research_plan' in data.research_output.metadata) && Array.isArray(data.research_output.sections) && Array.isArray(data.research_output.notes) && Array.isArray(data.research_output.answer_evaluator_notes) && allRefinementsEmpty && noMultiSelectLanguage && choicesAreSingleSelectShape && noteShape && walk(data); })()
